title: Workplace Violence Prevention Policy
scenario: Create a workplace violence prevention policy for a healthcare setting. The policy should include a description of workplace violence, instructions for reporting and responding to incidents, and guidelines for employee training and awareness. The policy should be written in a clear and concise manner, using simple language and diagrams. The policy should be no more than 200 words and assume a healthcare setting with a staff of 50.
constraints: Must be no more than 200 words
Must use diagrams to illustrate reporting and responding to incidents

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the policy adheres to the word count and diagram constraints.
Check if the policy is written in a clear and concise manner, using simple language.
Check if the policy includes accurate and relevant information about workplace violence, reporting, and responding to incidents.
